svg.text: ASP.NET Core 8 · React 18 (Webpack 5 Module Federation) · EF Core 8 · Microsoft Azure
CLIENT LAYER — Micro Frontends (Webpack 5 Module Federation)
Shell Host App [JWT Context | React Router] · Shared singletons: react, react-dom, @mui/material, Axios · Azure Static Web Apps
Employee Remote [Benefits | Claims | CTC] · Manager Remote [Approve | Reject | Queue]
HR Admin Remote [Config | Plans | Rules] · Finance Remote [Reports | Audit Trail]
Auth Shared Library: JWT decode | Role guards | Axios Bearer interceptor · Shell loads Remote App based on JWT role
[ Each remote deployed as Azure Static Web Apps ]
Azure APIM [cloud] · Rate Limiting | Versioning | Auth Offload | Routing to AKS pods (1 pod per service)
Direct localhost:5001 [local dev] — No gateway, direct HTTP to ASP.NET Core
API LAYER — ASP.NET Core 8 Web API
JWT Middleware: AddJwtBearer() · Token | Expiry | Issuer · [Authorize(Roles=...)] enforced on all 7 controllers
Validates JWT on every request · Sets ClaimsPrincipal · reads JWT signing key from Secrets vault
Routes: /api/v1/{users | benefits | compensation | claims | payroll | promotions | reports} · Payroll = GET payslips on-demand (sync) + monthly settlement async (Background Jobs)
BUSINESS LAYER — 7 Modules · CQRS Pattern | MediatR Commands + Queries + Handlers
INTEGRATION LAYER — External Adapters | Event Infrastructure | Serverless
DATA LAYER — EF Core 8 Provider Model (same DbContext · same LINQ · same Migrations)
